heading: Blank forms: printing and sale to public
label: 1709 Blank forms: printing and sale to public
text: The Director of the Government Publishing Office may print for sale by the Superintendent of Documents to the public, upon prepayment, additional copies of approved Government blank forms.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 94 (, ).June 7, 1924, ch. 303, § 143 Stat. 592
Amendments2014— substituted “Director of the Government Publishing Office” for “Public Printer”.Pub. L. 113–235
